entries.name: rbac-purge-expired-assignments
entries.purpose: Every hour on the hour: remove `model_has_roles` rows past their expires_at + fire RoleAssignmentExpired per removal. The listener chain invalidates the affected principals' caches + dispatches revoke notifications.

entries.name: rbac-reconcile-role-definitions
entries.purpose: Daily 04:00 UTC: reconcile role_definitions rows against `data/role-catalogue.json`. Catches drift when the catalogue was updated but `rbac:sync-role-definitions` wasn't run in the deploy pipeline. Idempotent.

entries.name: rbac-purge-soft-deleted-roles
entries.purpose: Daily 05:00 UTC: hard-delete `roles` rows past their 90-day soft-delete retention window.

entries.name: rbac-fire-expiring-notifications
entries.purpose: Daily 10:00 UTC (business hours, US): dispatch RoleAssignmentExpiringNotification for every assignment whose expires_at falls within config('rbac.assignments.reminder_days_before_expiry') days from now. Also fires the 24h-before-expiry final reminder.

entries.name: rbac-emit-quota-metrics
entries.purpose: Every 15 minutes: sample custom_role_slot usage per tenant + emit `academorix.rbac.custom_role_slot_usage` gauge. Feeds the tier-adoption dashboard.
